title: eriophyllum multiflorum
intro: Eriophyllum multiflorum, also known as Oregon sunshine, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and southwestern Canada. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Eriophyllum multiflorum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and can be dried and used as a calming and soothing herbal remedy.
